architecture: Full-stack waste management platform. Backend: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy async + TimescaleDB + Celery workers + Milvus RAG + Ollama LLM + MQTT telemetry. Frontend: Next.js (scaffold only). Docker Compose orchestrates 10 services.

facts.content: Use asyncpg for FastAPI async engine and psycopg2-binary for Celery sync engine (Reason: Celery workers run synchronously and cannot use asyncpg; FastAPI benefits from async I/O)
context_window: JWT tokens stored with JTI claim for Redis blacklisting on logout (Reason: Stateless JWT with revocation capability via Redis TTL-keyed blacklist)
Mosquitto port 9001 conflicts with Milvus port 9091 in docker-compose (Reason: Kept as specified in requirements; user should be aware of potential conflict)
